sponsorshiplink.Title: You can include a sponsorship link if you want users to support your work
sponsorshiplink.Detail: Consider to add a sponsorship link in your plugin.json file (Info.Links section: with Name: 'sponsor' or Name: 'sponsorship'), which will be shown on the plugin details page to allow users to support your work if they wish.
